–INSTANCES OF
  .Naboth on the charge of blasphemy1Ki 21:13; with 21:1-16
  .Jeremiah of treasonable prophecy, but of which he was acquittedJer 26:1-24
  .A second indictmentJer 37:13-15
  .Three Hebrew captives on the charge of defiance against authorityDa 3:12; with 3:1-28
  .Daniel, on the charge of defiance against authorityDa 6:13; with 6:1-24
  .Jesus, under two charges
    First, of blasphemyMt 26:61;Mr 14:58;Mt 26:63-65;Mr 14:61-64;Lu 22:67-71;Joh 19:7
    The second, of treasonMt 27:11,37;Mr 15:2,26;Lu 23:2,3,38;Joh 18:30,33;19:12,19-22
  .Stephen for blasphemyAc 6:11,13
  .PaulAc 17:7;18:13;24:5;25:18,19,26,27
  .Paul and SilasAc 16:20,21
  .Indictment quashedAc 18:14-16
